faqs.question: What types of ants are most common in Passaic, NJ?
faqs.answer: Passaic residents most frequently encounter pavement ants, carpenter ants, and odorous house ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning in older Passaic homes as they can damage wooden structures. Our technicians identify the specific species during inspection to apply the most effective treatment method.
